title: GitHub full inventory

findings.subject: viewport-corp repository inventory
findings.finding: GitHub API returned 9 repositories for viewport-corp.

findings.subject: GitHub write access test
findings.recommended_action: If FAIL, repair GitHub auth before relying on GitHub as source of truth.

findings.subject: Repos with no commits in last 30 days
findings.finding: 0 repos have no default-branch commit in last 30 days.
findings.recommended_action: Confirm whether each is archive/reference or revive work.

findings.subject: Repos with issues but no linked/open PRs
findings.finding: 1 repos have open issues and zero open PRs by search count.
findings.recommended_action: Triage active issues; link PRs or close stale issues.

findings.subject: Repos with runtime contracts
findings.recommended_action: Add RuntimeContract files for every deployed runtime.

findings.subject: Missing tenant/owner assignment
findings.finding: 2 repos could not be assigned to Viewport/MLG/BCCL by name/topics/description.
findings.recommended_action: Add explicit tenant/owner metadata/topic to each repo.

findings.subject: PAT scope/expiry
findings.finding: GitHub token scopes header: admin:enterprise, admin:gpg_key, admin:org, admin:org_hook, admin:public_key, admin:repo_hook, admin:ssh_signing_key, audit_log, codespace, copilot, delete:packages, delete_repo, gist, notifications, project, repo, user, workflow, write:discussion, write:network_configurations, write:packages; expiration header: UNKNOWN.
findings.recommended_action: Recommend GitHub App auth for least-privilege, auditable, revocable automation instead of broad PAT reliance.

recommended_action: Switch automation to GitHub App auth and triage repos missing owners/runtime contracts/active PR links.
